376.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
376.description: I didn't have sexual relations with that woman stated Bill Clinton, denying a sexual relationship with Monica Lewinsky. He was later impeached for his relationship with her.

377.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
377.description: Jessica Hahn's rape allegation against televangelist conman Jim Bakker lead to the downfall of the Praise The Lord Network empire that was stealing millions from its followers.

414.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
414.description: Rachel Uchitel's sex-affair of secret meetings and scandalous messages with Tiger Woods led her to become the face of Woods' career and marriage collapsing before the entire world.

415.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
415.description: Former teacher Mary Kay Letourneau had a sexual relationship with a student. After years in prison they married and had children, as the world continues to scorn their relationship.

7121.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7121.description: Heidi Fleiss ran a prostitution ring in the 90's in LA. Her infamous red journal is known to reveal her many high-profile clients, including actors, musicians and politicians.

7122.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7122.description: Jennifer Wilbanks was the subject of a media circus when she faked her own kidnapping and claimed she was sexually abused. Wilbanks eventually revealed why she abandoned her fiancé 4 days before their wedding.

7159.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7159.description: TV personality Kim Kardashian builds a multi-million-dollar empire and becomes a pop culture phenomena, Kardashian's leaked sex tape thrusts her into the limelight, and her nude backside famously "broke" the internet in 2014.

7160.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
7160.description: A teen from an affluent family drunkenly runs down a disabled SUV killing four people and injuring nine; the trial thrusts Ethan and his family into the spotlight when his lawyers claim he cannot serve jail time due to Affluenza.
